title: Cat's Skills
description: A simple skill mod that adds a new menu, 12 new skills, and a couple of extra features. Have fun!
body:
## Overview
A simple skill mod that adds 12 skills. Due to a glitch with the modding software, JEI might not work. The only crafting recipe is the infobook, which is a book surrounded by 4 lapis. Fun fact: The top of the skilltree contains helmet skills, bottom is legging skills, left is sword, and right is bow! Most skills require FOCUS, the mana of this mod. FOCUS regenerates at a speed of 1F/second, and the max is 8. Skill Points, used to obtain skills, are obtained simply by collecting exp. The amount of exp needed for each skillpoint will go up the more you have, but otherwise that's it. Have fun and report any bugs in the discord!

## Skills
It is reccomended to try these out for yourself, and there is an ingame guide, but read on if you wish!
### Helmet Skills
All Helmet Skills activate when the Helmet Skill keybind is pressed.         
Venomous Thorns - If hit during the duration of the effect (about 1.5 seconds), the attacker is poisoned.
Echolocation - Sends out a ping, letting you see nearby entities through walls for about 3 seconds.     
The Cure - Removes certain negative potion effects. These include Slowness, Poison, Hunger, and Wither.
### Bow Skills
Bow Skills simply activate on hit.  
Electrified - Arrows strike the target with lightning, simple enough.   
Ender Hook - Teleport to the target when they are shot.   
Chaos Strike - Inflicts a random negative potion effect for a couple seconds on hit.
### Legging Skills
Legging Skills activate when crouching.  
Hyperjump - Jump when crouching to shoot four blocks high!  
Featherfall - Crouch in midair to gain slow falling.  
Heartlock - Crouch to put up an energy shield, reducing damage (too op - nerf coming in next update)
### Sword Skills
Activate Sword Skills by right-clicking with the sword in hand.  
Enderman's Grace - Phase forward 5 blocks (Even in midair), similar to Hypixel Skyblock's AotE.  
Withergaze - Shoot a wither skull projectile in the direction you're facing.  
Destructive Rage - Each use gives a stacking strength effect, lasting around 1.5 seconds. The timer is reset each use. Stacks up to Strength 3, or 5 if you have less than half health.
